original_title: VENU-416 Mother And Son's Love Beginning With A Kiss, Adhesion, Rich Sex Yui Hatano
overview: Yui divorced her husband a year ago. The reason was that she loved her son Satoshi more than her husband. Since then, Yui has been living with Satoshi alone. Yui and Satoshi, who thought that they didn't have to worry about their husbands anymore, sought each other's bodies at any time. Free points for the first 1,000 yen!
